title: actionlint Configuration
description: Configuration file for actionlint GitHub Actions linter (.actionlint.yaml)

labels.description: List of labels for self-hosted runners (supports glob patterns via Go path.Match syntax, e.g. gpu-*)

oneOf.description: List of configuration variable names available in the repository. Empty array enables strict mode (no variables allowed).

paths.description: Per-path configurations keyed by glob patterns (relative to repo root)

ignore.description: Regular expressions (RE2 syntax) to filter errors by message content
